title: commelina hirsuta
intro: Commelina hirsuta, also known as hairy dayflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Commelina hirsuta include relieving fever, treating wounds, and reducing inflammation, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Commelina hirsuta include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
